description.value:
Receive Prescription processing vma-aanvullend-middel building blocks for patient J. XXX_Willemsz
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_ontvangen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 23.3b afhandelen voorschrift t.b.v. VMA <span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full xforms-visited" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙21"><span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙16">TEST Scenarioset 23.3b afhandelen voorschrift na afhandeling VMA t.b.v. Aanvullend middel VMA
Receive Prescription processing vma-aanvullend-middel resources in a transaction Bundle
Test server to handle a Bundle of type transaction.
Checks if all resources specified by the scenario can be identified unambiguously.
Confirm that the response Bundle contains 1 Medication resource that contains code '2748088|urn:oid:2.16.840.1.113883.2.4.4.7' (PLEINVUE POEDER VOOR DRANK IN SACHET)
